content: Response rate benchmarks for playlist curator pitching: Cold email response/acceptance rate averages 5-10% of pitches. SubmitHub premium submissions: 20-25% acceptance rate platform-wide (individual ranges 5-40% by genre/quality). PlaylistPush: ~32% playlist adds. Cold email to curators outside platforms: curators receive 200-1,000 submissions per week, reject 95%+. Key timing impact: pitching 21-40 days before release = 18% acceptance rate; pitching 1-3 days before = 4% acceptance rate. Prior relationship dramatically improves rates — artists who have been placed by a curator previously get significantly higher response rates on future pitches.
